title: stelis flexilis
intro: Stelis flexilis, commonly known as the bent orchid or flexile orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stelis flexilis include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be consumed as a decoction or infused in hot water to create a tea, or it can be applied topically as a poultice to treat skin conditions and injuries.
